[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2020-07-06
[TITLE]: Melania Trump news: First Lady wows in white dress for Independence Day | Express.co.uk
[METADATA/INTRO]: Melania Trump wears unusual £1900 dress created by London students for Independence Day MELANIA TRUMP had a different look as she stepped out to celebrate Independence Day with her husband, President Donald Trump. The First Lady wore a designer dress...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Melania attended an Independence Day celebration on Friday with her husband, wearing a white dress from Alexander McQueen that costs almost £2,000. 
 The white sleeveless dress featured an asymmetric hem, with a full skirt and a bizarre doodle print. 
 The dress was from the designer’s Spring 2020 collection and was made with the help of English design students in London. 
 Melania Trump shows off her model figure with recycled £1,600 dress [PICTURES] 
 Melania Trump’s hair colour trick for an instant anti-ageing effect [INSIGHT] 
 Melania Trump’s diet trick that could help you to live longer [COMMENT] 
 The unique print was created in a collaboration between the label and Central Saint Martins students, who drew sketches during a life-drawing class led by fashion illustrator Julie Verhoeven.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: The mystery of Ivanka Trump’s white outfits and what they mean – The Irish Times
[METADATA/INTRO]: If a face mask has become the pandemic’s defining symbol, has the colour white become shorthand for Ivanka Trump’s handling of it? It began in June with a $1,500 (€1,200) white MaxMara handbag. It continued on Monday with an untucked...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Take the white funnel-neck dress she wore to a meeting for a new White House-backed advertising campaign which aims to encourage people who are "unemployed" or "unhappy" in their jobs to "find something new". Or the untouchable white Emilia Wickstead skirt and blouse, paired with a white quilted Chanel handbag (and matching white quilted mask) which she wore after the campaign's backlash. 
 Or even the two white sleeveless shift-dresses she wore for internal flights aboard Air Force One (which begs the question, who flies in white when there’s Big Tom and turbulence? Someone whose private plane has loos roomy enough for a full costume change, that’s who).

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Melania Trump's $2400 'Sharpiegate' inspired dress slammed on social media - 9Honey
[METADATA/INTRO]: Melania Trump's $2400 'Sharpiegate' inspired dress slammed on social media By Emily Lefroy|...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The Alexander McQueen dress was designed for the Spring 2020 collection, and enlisted the help of English design students in London The designs were embroiled onto the ivory sleeveless dress. 
 However, Twitter users were less than impressed with the design, many joking that Trump must have gotten to the markers before they left for the event. 
 "Melania pulled a plain white dress for her evening in North Dakota and before they left Trump took a sharpie marker to it" one user tweeted. 
 Others used the dress to remind people of 'Sharpiegate,' an incident in 2019 where President Trump appeared to alter a hurricane map with a sharpie, after he incorrectly stated Alabama was going that was going to be affected by an upcoming storm, altering a map to change the hurricane's track.
